ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rf_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF signal */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the RF signal */,
  "raw_signal" REAL /* Raw signal value */,
  "error" REAL /* Error margin for the raw signal */,
  "smoothed_signal" REAL /* Smoothed signal value */,
  "error_smoothed" REAL /* Error margin for the smoothed signal */,
  "signal_source" TEXT /* Source of the RF signal (e.g., simulation, measurement) */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date when the RF signal was collected */,
  "signal_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the RF signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equalizations" (
  "equalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equalization parameter set */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF signal being equalized */,
  "equalization_type" TEXT /* Type of equalization (e.g., linear, non-linear) */,
  "parametric_eq" REAL /* Parametric equalization value */,
  "equalized_raw" REAL /* Equalized raw signal value */,
  "equalized_smoothed" REAL /* Equalized smoothed signal value */,
  "equalization_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the equalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equalizations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES rf_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target value */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF signal being targeted */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the RF signal */,
  "target_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the target value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES rf_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the RF signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the RF signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES rf_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workflow */,
  "workflow_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "workflow_description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "workflow_status" TEXT /* Status of the workflow (e.g., draft, active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_steps_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow that generated the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_results_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF signal being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES rf_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF signal being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES rf_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
